<!-- Generated by an automated UI/API feature-audit workflow (84 agents, 4 phases:
     map â†’ probe â†’ adversarial verify â†’ synthesize). 88 candidates â†’ 56 confirmed. -->

## Method & environment

- **Target:** claude-monitor **v3.5.1**, built from source and run on `http://localhost:7700` against the real `~/.claude-monitor/history.db` (3,300+ sessions).
- **Oracles:** live HTTP API, a read-only SQLite snapshot (independent recompute), 1,675 raw `~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl` files, and ephemeral Playwright scripts (one headless browser per spec) for the UI.
- **Confidence:** every finding below was adversarially verified â€” a second agent tried to *refute* it and only confirmed ones that independently reproduced. 4 candidates were rejected as false positives.

## Fix status (this branch â€” single MR)

**Landed (verified):**
- âœ… **P0** `/api/stats` window boundary now UTC â€” fixes today/week/month ~4Ă— over-count (`sqlite.go`)
- âœ… **P0** trends window boundary now RFC3339-`Z` â€” fixes 24h ~51% / 30d ~2% over-count (`sqlite.go`)
- âœ… canonical UTC storage of `started_at`/`ended_at` (`sqlite.go`) + `?window=` validation (`handlers.go`)
- âœ… 2 regression tests (proven to fail pre-fix) + de-flaked a pre-existing time-of-day-dependent test (`sqlite_test.go`)
- âœ… TABLE permanently-blank-after-leave; TABLE duration (`lastActiveâˆ’startedAt` + zero-time guard)
- âœ… TIMELINE zero-timestamp anchor; GRAPH reflow-on-resize; donut distinct colors
- âœ… stuck "Budget exceeded" banner; `1/2/3` keyboard guard for `<select>`; responsive feed `min-width:0`

**Follow-up (landing on this same branch via a second workflow):** the medium-risk backlog â€” `total_cost`/`error_count` restart backfill, History pagination + subagent-inclusive cost, FTS index rebuild + multi-word AND search, `<synthetic>` model relabeling, Analytics empty-states/labels, replay manifest `total/hasMore`, remaining API validation + OpenAPI drift.

---

# UI Audit â€” claude-monitor (v3.5.1)

> Goal: make this the best possible UI with stats **as accurate as possible**. Findings are weighted toward the most-used features: **active agents, cost, history, search**. Every issue below was independently reproduced against the live server at `http://localhost:7700`, the read-only SQLite oracle, and traced to source. Dollar figures are live-DB snapshots and drift upward as the monitor ingests; mechanisms and ratios are stable.

## Executive summary

The cost math itself is **correct** â€” per-million-token pricing, `/1e6` division, four token types, and longest-prefix model resolution all verified to <1e-6 error across every model family. The problem is **everything around the numbers**: the time-window comparisons, the persisted aggregates, and several UI count/label definitions.

Highest-impact themes:

1. **Time-window boundaries are compared as mismatched strings, not instants.** `started_at` is stored as UTC RFC3339 with a `Z` suffix, but window boundaries are emitted either with a local offset (`-07:00`) or as a space-separated `datetime('now',â€¦)` string. SQLite compares these lexicographically, so the default `TODAY` spend over-reports **~4x** ($743 vs $185 true) and the Analytics `24H` trend over-reports **~50%** ($1177 vs $784 true). These are the headline numbers users read first. (4 distinct findings, same root cause, all P0/P1.)
2. **Persisted `sessions.total_cost` drifts below ground truth after restart.** The canonical cost figure the API serves under-reports the per-message events ledger by **~$95 / 2.3%** in aggregate and up to **5x** for individual sessions (worst: $109.86 stored vs $172.61 true). Tokens restore correctly; only cost is frozen at a stale value.
3. **"Active" has no single definition.** The API counts parents+subagents; the topbar badge and sidebar count top-level only; the budget popover counts subagents; the sidebar list uses a client 45s threshold. The badge can read `ACTIVE 0/1` while the popover beside it lists 7 active rows.
4. **`error_count` accumulates across re-bootstraps.** 741 of 770 sessions show inflated error badges (worst 759 vs 53 real); clicking the badge shows the real, smaller number â€” the UI contradicts itself.
5. **History can never reach ~93% of its data** (single 200-row fetch, no pagination), and its **Cost column ignores subagent spend**, mis-ranking the most expensive session trees.
6. **Search has a corrupted FTS index** returning false-positive `[tool: Bash]` rows that highlight nothing, plus exact-phrase-only matching that silently drops multi-word results.
7. Two **completely-broken-after-first-use** view bugs: TABLE goes permanently blank after leaving it once; TIMELINE collapses to an unusable sliver for ~24.5% of sessions (zero-timestamp anchor).

---

## Stats accuracy â€” computed vs actual

All diffs are single-snapshot, drift-free (live API value matched against the byte-identical buggy SQL it runs, and against the correct instant-aligned query).

| Metric / window | Shown (buggy) | Correct | Error | Mechanism |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `/api/stats?window=today` cost | **$743.05** / 167 sess | $185.47 / 47 sess | **+$557.58 (~4.0x)** | local-offset `â€¦-07:00` boundary string-compared vs UTC `â€¦Z` (`sqlite.go:718` `since.Format(time.RFC3339)`) |
| `/api/stats?window=today` tokens (cacheRead) | 239.6M | 53.8M | **+4.46x** | same |
| `/api/stats/trends?window=24h` cost | **$1164.82** / 215 rows | $771.61 / 200 rows | **+$393.22 (~51%)** | `datetime('now','-1 days')` (space-sep, no `Z`) vs `â€¦Z` (`sqlite.go:808/951`) |
| `/api/stats/trends?window=30d` cost | $3086.68 / 1125 | $3030.40 / 1116 | +$56.28 (~1.9â€“2.7%) | same as 24h, smaller partial-day reach-back |
| Analytics daily bar `2026-05-30` | $756.88 | $199.31 true local day | **~3.8x overstated** | trend buckets use UTC days, not local (`strftime` w/o `'localtime'`, `sqlite.go:867/910`) |
| Canonical `SUM(sessions.total_cost)` | $4088.94 | $4183.68 (events ledger) | **âˆ’$94.74 (âˆ’2.3%)** | restart re-seeds stale `total_cost`; per-session up to 5x low |
| Cost formula (5 models) | â€” | matches API | **0.000%** | âœ… no defect â€” pricing/units/prefix resolution all correct |
| `cacheHitPct`, token sums | â€” | matches API | **0.000%** | âœ… no defect |

> The two boundary bugs are the same class of error appearing on **two different, identically-labeled "TOTAL SPEND" surfaces**, which then disagree with each other by ~63% (topbar TODAY vs Analytics 24H) even though a user reads them as the same period.

---

## Active Agents (most-popular)

- **[P1][inaccuracy] Topbar ACTIVE badge undercounts by excluding subagents â€” contradicts the API and its own burn-rate popover on the same screen.** The API (`/api/stats.activeSessions`, `?active=true`, `?group=activity`) counts all active rows; the topbar badge and sidebar recount client-side as `s.isActive && !s.parentId`; the budget popover counts subagents. *Repro:* with a parent running active subagents, badge='1' while API=6 and popover lists 7 rows. *Evidence:* `topbar.ts:231-235`, `session-list.ts:234/245`, `handlers.go:234-238`; screenshot `active-popover__active-popover.png` ("ACTIVE 0" beside 7 popover rows).
- **[P1][bug] A stale parent with live subagents renders as a green WAITING card but lands in LAST HOUR, not ACTIVE.** Bucketing uses `isSessionActive(sess.lastActive)` (45s wall-clock) while the card draws from the transformed `sess.isActive`. *Repro:* parent `88265480` (6 live children, `lastActive` >45s old) shows green dot + WAITING under LAST HOUR while ACTIVE reads (0/1). *Evidence:* `session-list.ts:169` vs the `localSessions` transform at `137-146`; screenshot `active-bucket-zoom__sidebar.png`.
- **[P2][inaccuracy] RECENT filter badge double-counts active subagents (badge 11-12 vs 4 visible cards).** `recentCount` (`session-list.ts:226`) uses `active.length` while every sibling count uses `!parentId`. *Repro:* 1 top-level + 6 active subagents â†’ `#fc-recent`=12 but only 4 top-level cards render. *Evidence:* `active.filter(s=>!s.parentId)`=1 vs `active.length`=7.
- **[P3][inaccuracy] Sidebar "ACTIVE NOW" uses client 45s threshold vs server 30s/5s `isActive`** â€” a top-level session in the 30â€“45s decay window shows in the list with a grey idle dot while the badge counts it idle (`utils.ts:65` `ACTIVE_THRESHOLD_MS=45_000`).
- **[P3][inaccuracy] Three active-count API endpoints share no snapshot, so they can transiently disagree by 1** at a threshold edge (`handlers.go:54/92/234` each call `All()` at a different instant). Server-internal only; never surfaced in the UI.

## Cost (most-popular)

- **[P0][inaccuracy] `/api/stats` window=today/week/month over-counts ~4x.** Local-offset RFC3339 boundary (`2026-05-30T00:00:00-07:00`) string-compared against UTC-`Z` `started_at`; `-`(0x2D) sorts before `Z`(0x5A), pulling yesterday-evening-local rows into "today". *Repro:* API today=$743/167 == buggy SQL; correct (`>= 'â€¦T07:00:00Z'`)=$185/47; the 120 extra rows span 2026-05-29 17:00â€“23:59 PDT. *Evidence:* `sqlite.go:718` `since.Format(time.RFC3339)`; `handlers.go:213-222` builds the local `since`.
- **[P1][inaccuracy] Canonical cost under-reports the per-message ledger by ~$95 (2.3%); individual sessions up to 5x low.** On restart, `LoadMessageDedup` re-seeds the prev-cost map from `events` (correct, $172.61) but `s.TotalCost` is restored from the stale `sessions` row ($109.86); deltas are then ~0, freezing the gap forever. Tokens restore correctly via the same map. *Evidence:* session `b0929f13` tokensĂ—opus-4-8 price = events `SUM(cost_usd)` = $172.61 but `sessions.total_cost`=$109.86; `pipeline.go:135-150`, `sqlite.go:491-516`, `pipeline.go:462-477`.
- **[P1][inaccuracy] "PROJECTED TODAY" uses the windowed total as its base, not today's spend.** With window=ALL it shows $5591 â€” larger than all-time spend ($4200) â€” and jumps by thousands when the unrelated topbar window toggle is flipped. *Evidence:* `budget-popover.ts:127/292` pass `state.stats.totalCost` (windowed) to `getProjectedDailyCost`.
- **[P1][bug] Clearing the budget after going over leaves the cost stat red and the "Budget exceeded" banner stuck forever.** `checkBudget()` early-returns on a null threshold *before* the cleanup branch. *Repro:* set budget below spend â†’ Set â†’ red banner; click Clear â†’ banner stays; 12s later still red. *Evidence:* `budget-popover.ts:412` guard; cleanup only in `else` at `437-441`.
- **[P2][inaccuracy] Cost-breakdown donut: legend dollars/percentages exclude `<synthetic>`/`unknown` but divide by `stats.totalCost` (which includes them)** â†’ percentages sum to ~99%, legend dollars fall ~$62 short of the center total, and the donut has an unexplained empty wedge. *Evidence:* `cost-breakdown.ts:30/37/83/94`.
- **[P2][inaccuracy] Sessions whose last event is `<synthetic>` store `model='<synthetic>'`,** mislabeling ~$58 of real opus spend under a fake model in the Model Mix chart, trends API, session cards, and markdown export. Cost totals stay correct. *Evidence:* `pipeline.go:305-306` last-write-wins; `sqlite.go:991-996` trend grouping; `analytics-cards.ts:124`.
- **[P2][polish] Cost-breakdown donut: unmapped current models (opus-4-7 ~50%, opus-4-8 ~34%) all render identical `#888` gray,** so the two biggest cost drivers are visually indistinguishable; ~84% of the donut is one flat color. *Evidence:* 4-entry color map in `cost-breakdown.ts:69-74`.
- **[P2][inaccuracy] Burn-rate panel "BURN RATE" diverges from topbar "$/MIN" for the same metric** (panel sums a never-re-derived client snapshot of `sess.costRate`; topbar uses the server's recomputed `costRate`). Observed $5.020 vs $3.893. *Evidence:* `burn-rate.ts:18-31/67-70`, `state.ts:125-130`.
- **[P2][ux-friction] Budget threshold compares against the windowed total, and the "Budget window" selector is an alias of the topbar window,** so a small budget set on the ALL window is instantly "exceeded" against all-time spend, and changing the budget window silently retargets the topbar TOTAL SPEND. *Evidence:* `budget-popover.ts:126/196/278-283`.
- **[P3][bug] Cost-breakdown legend overflows the popover by ~7px,** spilling the trailing `(%)` onto adjacent content (dollar values stay fully readable). *Evidence:* `.cb-legend` flex child lacks `min-width:0`; `views.css:361`.

## History (most-popular)

- **[P1][missing] No pagination/infinite-scroll: one `fetchSessions(200, 0)` leaves ~2800 of 3000 sessions permanently unreachable.** Scrolling to the bottom loads nothing; no count/"load more". *Evidence:* `history-view.ts:123`; live network capture shows the only paginated fetch is `?limit=200&offset=0`; API supports `offset` and `limitâ‰¤500`.
- **[P1][inaccuracy] Cost column (and its sort) uses parent own-cost only, ignoring subagent spend,** mis-ranking the most expensive trees and contradicting the same-row badge. *Repro:* `b0929f13` row shows $109.86 with badge "(108 subagents, $414.40)"; true tree = $524.26 but it sorts #2 behind a $167 tree. *Evidence:* `history-view.ts:39/436` (own `totalCost`) vs badge at `:339`.
- **[P2][ux-friction] Session cell clips subagent/workflow cost badges at `max-width:200px`,** and `td.title` is the prompt (not the badge breakdown), so per-workflow costs are hidden in the collapsed view. *Evidence:* `views.css:133-140`; `history-view.ts:390`; cell `scrollWidth`=1394 vs `clientWidth`=228.

## Search (most-popular)

- **[P1][bug] Search returns false-positive un-highlighted `[tool: Bash]` rows** because the external-content FTS5 index is never purged on re-ingest (`INSERT OR REPLACE` does not delete old terms for `content=events` tables). 409 of 2954 "error" matches have clean live columns. *Repro:* `/error` shows ~7/31 bare `[tool: Bash]` rows with no `<mark>`; oracle confirms FTS matches rows whose live `content_preview`/`tool_name`/`tool_detail` contain no match. *Evidence:* `sqlite.go:1122/1196` (no FTS5 `'delete'` command, no triggers).
- **[P2][bug] Preview shows `[tool: Bash]` for events whose real tool was Read/Grep** â€” the preview reflects the *first* tool_use block while `tool_name`/`tool_detail` reflect the *last*. 8,387 mismatched rows + 13,584 with empty tool fields. *Evidence:* `parser.go:591-593` (first-block guard) vs `:584` (last-block `toolName`).
- **[P2][ux-friction] `/api/search` treats every multi-word query as an exact-adjacent phrase, not implicit-AND,** silently dropping matches (`session not` â†’ 7 results vs 135 with AND), and OpenAPI falsely advertises "FTS5 match syntax". *Evidence:* `sqlite.go:1366` wraps the whole query in one pair of quotes.

## Other Views (graph / table / timeline / replay / analytics)

- **[P1][bug] TABLE view becomes permanently blank after leaving it once.** The cached `tableEl` is destroyed by `feed-panel.ts:126`'s `innerHTML=''`, but `renderTable()`'s `if (!tableEl)` guard then writes into the orphaned node. Recoverable only by full reload; fails silently. *Evidence:* `table-view.ts:92-103`; live spec: enterâ†’733 rows, toggle awayâ†’0 `.table-view` in DOM, returnâ†’still 0.
- **[P1][inaccuracy] TABLE DURATION shows `now âˆ’ startedAt` instead of `lastActive âˆ’ startedAt`,** contradicting cards/History for nearly every session (732/733 diverge >30min). *Repro:* `530d2c72` table=26h54m vs card/History=4h27m (~6x). *Evidence:* `table-view.ts:141` + sort comparator `66-67`.
- **[P2][bug] TABLE DURATION renders `17754383h3m` for Go zero-time `startedAt`** (~75% of rows); `s.startedAt ?` is a truthiness-only guard that the sentinel string passes, and the duration sort pins these to the extreme. *Evidence:* `table-view.ts:141`; `new Date('0001-01-01T00:00:00Z')` â‰ˆ âˆ’6.2e13ms.
- **[P1][inaccuracy] TIMELINE collapses to a ~3px sliver for ~24.5% of sessions.** A leading synthetic meta-event with timestamp `0001-01-01` anchors `t0` to year 0001, making `pixelsPerMs` â‰ˆ 1.7e-11 and the time-axis an overlapping smear. A clean session renders perfectly, proving it's the anchor. *Evidence:* `timeline-view.ts:111/165/337`; replay shows `events[0].timestamp='0001-01-01T00:00:00Z'`, span ~63.9e9s.
- **[P2][missing] TIMELINE shows a blank canvas (3 empty lanes, no message) for <2-event sessions** (e.g. `journal`, 1 event). No empty-state, no loading/error surface. *Evidence:* `timeline-view.ts:313/335` early-returns with no else branch.
- **[P2][bug] Graph canvas does not reflow on window resize** â€” the inline px width holds the flex container open, so `container.clientWidth` reads stale and the node cluster clips off the right edge (`#main` has `overflow:hidden`, so no scrollbar) until the view is re-entered. *Evidence:* `graph-view.ts:210-221`; at 700px the canvas stays 1157px.
- **[P2][inaccuracy] Analytics 24h: hours with only subagent/child rows plot cost>0 but force avg/median/p95/avg-tokens to 0,** so the session-distribution charts dive to zero exactly where cost spikes. Totals still reconcile. *Evidence:* `sqlite.go:866-942` (cost over all rows, distributions over top-level only); shared x-axis in `analytics-cards.ts`.
- **[P2][missing] Analytics has no empty state:** a zero-data window/repo (e.g. 24H + repo `test`) renders blank charts with a 0..1 axis and an orphaned legend, no "No data" message. *Evidence:* `analytics-view.ts:128`; `analytics-cards.ts:326-329`.
- **[P2][ux-friction] Two identically-labeled "TOTAL SPEND" figures with different windows AND different sessionCount semantics** appear simultaneously (topbar MONTH all-rows vs Analytics 7d top-level), with no on-screen reconciliation. *Evidence:* `analytics-view.ts:106`; `sqlite.go:702-707` vs `771-784`.
- **[P2][ux-friction] Analytics repo filter is polluted by 21 phantom `agent-*` subagent-worktree repos (39%) and renders 25/55 options as blank labels** (uses `r.name`, 16 real repos have empty names) in a non-searchable native `<select>`. *Root cause:* deleted subagent worktrees make the resolver fall back to `filepath.Base(cwd)='agent-XXXX'` (`resolver.go:72-78`).

## API

- **[P3][inaccuracy] `/api/stats` silently returns the lifetime aggregate for unknown/empty/uppercase window** (no 400), inconsistent with `/api/stats/trends` which 400s. *Evidence:* `handlers.go:215-222` switch has no default; `?window=bogus`â†’3378 sessions (= all). Not reachable from the UI (hardcoded valid windows).
- **[P3][bug] Replay timeline silently truncates** (default 1000, max 10000) with no `total`/`hasMore`; the UI never raises the limit, so the scrubber shows a false "1000 / 1000" for 22 sessions. Out-of-range `limit` (>10000) reverts to 1000 instead of clamping. *Evidence:* `handlers.go:722-724`.
- **[P3][bug] `/api/settings/{key}` skips validation for `retention_hot_days`/`retention_warm_days`** (only `preview_max_length` is checked); negative/non-numeric/empty values persist with 200 and are re-served. Defensively rejected at runtime; no UI surface. *Evidence:* `handlers.go:783-789`.
- **[P3][missing] `/api/repos/{id}/stats` and `/api/repos/{id}/sessions` return 200 (zeroed/empty) for unknown ids** instead of 404, inconsistent with `/api/sessions/{id}`. (Queries are parameterized â€” no injection.) *Evidence:* `handlers.go:310-346`.
- **[P3][polish] `AggregateStatsByRepo` unconditionally injects a phantom zero-cost `costByRepo` entry echoing the queried id** (even whitespace/unknown). *Evidence:* `sqlite.go:649` vs the guarded `costByModel` at `:645`.
- **[P3][bug] Wrong HTTP method on `/api` routes â†’ 404 (no `Allow`) instead of 405,** because the catch-all FileServer at `/` shadows ServeMux's built-in 405. *Evidence:* `main.go:587`; proven with a controlled mux test.
- **[P3][inaccuracy] OpenAPI drift** (several): replay `limit`/`offset` params undocumented + `ReplayManifest` omits them; `GET /events?last=` (empty) returns oldest 100 not the documented 50-most-recent (`handlers.go:495`); `TrendBucket.date` documented as `2026-03-25T14` but emitted as `2026-05-29 05:00`; `/api/search` `q` documented as "FTS5 match syntax" though operators are neutralized; `PUT /api/settings/{key}` doc claims "Creates the key if it does not exist" but enforces a 3-key allowlist (`openapi.yaml:605`).

## Accessibility / Responsive

- **[P1][bug] Feed/session-history is clipped and unreadable below ~768px.** `#feed-mount` and `.feed-content` lack `min-width:0`, so long monospace lines blow the flex item to ~1135px inside `#main{overflow:hidden}` â€” content cut off with no horizontal scroll. *Evidence:* `feed.css:140`, `index.html:15`; injecting `min-width:0` collapses both to 480px and eliminates all 70 overflowing rows.
- **[P2][bug] Sidebar shortcuts 1/2/3 fire while a `<select>` is focused.** `session-list.ts:77` guards only `HTMLInputElement`/`HTMLTextAreaElement`, omitting `HTMLSelectElement`/contenteditable that `main.ts:89-94` includes â€” colliding with native `<select>` digit typeahead and violating documented QA case 12.8. *Evidence:* focusing the analytics repo `<select>` and pressing 1/3/2 silently switches the sidebar filter.

> **Verified clean (no defect):** cost formula/units/prefix resolution (0.000%); `cacheHitPct` and all four token sums (0.000%); search syntax-error/SQL-injection/wildcard-escape hardening; sessions/events/repos/workflows pagination, clamping, ordering, and dedup; `/health`, `/api/version`, `/api/storage`, `/api/settings` round-trips; replay scrubber accuracy and speed pacing; graph render/hover/drag/click; keyboard map and help-overlay focus trap; ARIA labels and focus rings.

---

## Ranked improvement backlog (most impact first)

1. **Make all time-window comparisons instant-correct.** One-line `since.UTC().Format(...)` at `sqlite.go:718` fixes today/week/month (~4x â†’ correct); wrapping the trend boundary in `strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime(...))` at `sqlite.go:808/951` fixes 24h/7d/30d. These are the headline TOTAL SPEND numbers.
2. **Make `sessions.total_cost` provably equal the per-message ledger.** Recompute the cost/token accumulators from the restored cost map on restart + one-time backfill. Removes the ~$95/2.3% aggregate undercount and per-session 5x errors.
3. **Localize Analytics trend buckets** (`'localtime'` modifier) and add a timezone label so daily bars stop shifting ~7h.
4. **Pick one definition of "active" and use it everywhere** (recommend: include subagents, render `stats.activeSessions` in the badge). Fixes the badge/popover contradiction, the WAITING-card bucketing, and the RECENT double-count in one contract.
5. **Make `error_count` deterministic** (`COUNT(is_error=1)` at persist/serve, or dedup by uuid) + backfill 741 stale rows so the badge matches the click-through feed.
6. **Add History pagination/infinite-scroll** so all 3000 sessions are reachable, and **make the Cost column/sort reflect subagent spend** so the most expensive trees rank correctly.
7. **Repair the FTS index** (FTS5 `'delete'`-on-old or external-content triggers + one-time `'rebuild'`) to kill false-positive `[tool: Bash]` results; **switch search to per-token implicit-AND** so multi-word queries match.
8. **Fix the two "broken after first use" views:** TABLE re-attachment guard and TIMELINE zero-timestamp filter.
9. **Decouple PROJECTED TODAY and the budget** from the topbar window; fix the stuck over-budget banner.
10. **Make the TABLE DURATION** match cards/History and guard the zero-time sentinel.
11. **Add empty-states** (Analytics, Timeline `<2` events) and **reconcile the cost-breakdown donut** denominator + model colors.
12. **Responsive:** add `min-width:0` to the feed flex chain; align the sidebar keydown guard with `main.ts`.
13. **API hygiene:** validate `/api/stats` window, clamp/signal replay truncation, validate retention settings, 404 unknown repos, reconcile OpenAPI drift.
